LAW AND MOTION 302, NOV-16-2023. HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE / RE- NOTICE OF VERIFIED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE. COUNSEL PRESENTED ORAL ARGUMENT TO SUPPORT THEIR POSITIONS REGARDING THE COURT'S QUERY. AT CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT CONTINUES THE SUBJECT MOTION TO DEC-15-2023 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. COURT REPORTER: ANGELA POURTABIB, CSR: 13714, T: 415.601.7054, E: APOURTABIB@GMAIL.COM. (302/RBU)***AFTER HEARING: UPON FURTHER CONSIDERATION BY THE COURT, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE IS OFF CALENDAR PENDING RULING ON DEMURRER.

MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE / Re- Notice Of Verified Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Nov-16-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (in court):

Francis A. Bottini, Jr., Esq., of Bottini & Bottini, Inc., (858) 914-2001, for Plaintiff.
Brendan P. Cullen, Esq., of SULLIVAN & CROMWELL LLP, (650) 461-5600, for Defendant.

RE: Plaintiff's MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE / Re- Notice Of Verified Petition For Writ Of Mandate.

The court notes the pending Demurrer in this matter, set for Dec-15-2023 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302, and asks why the subject motion should not be heard afterwards. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions regarding the court's query. At conclusion of argument, the court continues the subject motion to Dec-15-2023 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. The subject motion shall be adjudicated after the court rules on the Dec-15-2023 Demurrer.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Robert Woods. Court Reporter: Angela Pourtabib, CSR: 13714, T: 415.601.7054, E: apourtabib@gmail.com. (302/RBU)

***After hearing: upon further consideration by the court, Plaintiff's Motion for Writ of Mandate is off calendar pending ruling on Demurrer.
